planner.description: Creates plans and may edit files.

release-notes-writer.description: Drafts release notes from commit ranges. Invoked via /ship.

plan.description: Run agent:planner and agent:release-notes-writer for release planning.

PostToolUse.description: Append tool-use events to opencode-tool.log; rollback by deleting that log.

github.description: GitHub API access for reading repo metadata.
